meaning: n.百慕大群岛(北大西洋西部群岛)
examples: The beautiful island of Bermuda is a magical place to get married.
In Bermuda, Sam's father took him on an excursion to a coral barrier.
The seas around Bermuda are full of colourful corals and fantastic fish.
Last week, Bermuda and other British overseas territories with financial centres signed agreements on sharing tax information.
Bermuda has so many wrecks they are literally piled on top of one another.
